title: raw beef's Blue Archive Edition
description: a modpack based on blue archive
body:
![ARISUCRAFT.EXE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea5aa13e353302f27bad7fb8c39c9370ead15a7f_0.webp)

**A modpack used in raw beef's Minecraft video**

FEATURES:

- Tacz weapons with Blue Archive addons
- Yes Steve Model mod (with Blue Archive models)
- Create mod
- Visual settings optimized for recording
- Improved Ender dragon fight
- And painting mod

TACZ ADDONS:

- [[TaCZ] Blue Archive super gun pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/tacz-blue-archive-super-gun-pack)
- [[TACZ] BlueArchive FPS Pack JP](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/taczbluearchive-fps-pack-jp)
